meta.source: YM.c.0 (E-mini Dow Jones, 10y, 2016-01-04…2026-05-11) + ES (SMT partner, secondary)

variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: ES took its OPPOSITE-side pre-news liquidity (YM short → ES low<pre_low; YM long → ES high>pre_high)
